0.text: Focal ground glass opacities in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

1.text: Focal ground glass opacities in the lateral subpleural area of the right upper lobe

2.text: Linear area of atelectasis in the right middle lobe

3.text: Increased interseptal thickness in the subpleural areas of both lungs

4.text: Increased interseptal thickness more prominent in the lower lobes of the lungs
